news.headline: Coincheck's parent company is the first Japanese crypto exchange operator on Nasdaq, following Coinbase's public debut in 2021.
news.summary: Coincheck Group recently made its debut on the Nasdaq, becoming the second regulated crypto exchange operator to go public. This comes after Coinbase's debut in 2021 as the first of its kind. The event highlights the increasing interest in the cryptocurrency market, with Coincheck Group joining the ranks of public companies involved in digital assets. This move further underscores the growing acceptance and integration of cryptocurrencies into the mainstream financial sector.

news.headline: Pastor accused of pushing $6M crypto Ponzi to followers, promising 35% returns. CFTC files charges.
news.summary: A pastor has been accused by the CFTC of endorsing a cryptocurrency scheme to members of his congregation. The scheme claimed to offer guaranteed returns of close to 35%.

news.headline: Santhera's AGAMREE® (vamorolone) approved in China for Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy patients aged 4+ by NMPA.
news.summary: In Pratteln, Switzerland on December 11, 2024, Santhera Pharmaceuticals revealed that AGAMREE® (vamorolone) has received approval from China's National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) for utilization in patients in China who are aged 4 years and above. Santhera Pharmaceuticals' stock, listed as SIX: SANN, is associated with this achievement in expanding the reach of AGAMREE® in China, indicating a significant milestone for the pharmaceutical company.

news.headline: BenevolentAI refocuses on original TechBio mission for transformative drug solutions, strategic overhaul announced.
news.summary: In London, BenevolentAI, a leader in merging artificial intelligence with biopharmaceutical advancement, has announced a significant strategic revamp aiming to realign the company with its original TechBio mission. This shift emphasizes a renewed focus on core technologies and innovation in order to enhance the creation of revolutionary drug discovery and development solutions. Concurrently, the company also plans to provide support for this initiative through undisclosed means.

news.headline: Two combination vaccine candidates for influenza and COVID-19 get Fast Track designation in the US.
news.summary: In the United States, two combination vaccine candidates have received Fast Track designation for the prevention of both influenza and COVID-19. This designation allows for expedited review and approval processes for these vaccines. This development is significant in the fight against both viruses, as it could potentially streamline the vaccination process and increase efficiency in immunization efforts. The Fast Track designation indicates that these vaccine candidates have shown promise in clinical trials and their development will be prioritized. This news marks an important step forward in combating the ongoing public health challenges posed by influenza and COVID-19.

news.headline: Red Eléctrica chooses Dassault Systèmes’ 3DEXPERIENCE platform for managing Spain’s electricity network data.
news.summary: In Velizy-Villacoublay, France, Dassault Systèmes revealed that Red Eléctrica, Spain's high voltage electricity system operator, has chosen their 3DEXPERIENCE platform on the cloud after a competitive selection process. This platform will aid in handling technical asset information for Spain's electricity network. Red Eléctrica serves as the TSO for the Spanish electricity system. Dassault Systèmes is listed on Euronext Paris under FR0014003TT8, DSY.PA.

news.headline: Pharming reports successful pediatric trial for leniolisib in APDS, rare immunodeficiency in children aged 4-11 years.
news.summary: A multinational Phase III clinical trial is currently investigating the efficacy of leniolisib tablets in children between the ages of 4 and 11 diagnosed with APDS, a rare primary immunodeficiency disorder. This study involves a significant number of participants internationally and aims to assess the effectiveness of the medication in treating this specific age group affected by the condition. The trial is an essential step in determining the potential benefits and safety of leniolisib for children with APDS, contributing valuable insights to the medical community and potentially offering a new treatment option for this rare primary immunodeficiency disorder affecting young individuals.

news.headline: November 2024 brings notable financial success for Coop Pank AS with impressive results.
Red Eléctrica improves design process and collaboration with Dassault Systèmes’ 3DEXPERIENCE Platform. #DassaultSystèmes #grid
Syrebo showcased innovations at MEDICA 2024 - upper limb, BCI, and home rehab robots introduced.
news.summary: In Shanghai on December 11, 2024, Syrebo unveiled a range of cutting-edge rehabilitation robot products at MEDICA 2024 in Düsseldorf on November 11. These included an upper limb rehabilitation robot, a BCI rehabilitation robot, and a newly introduced home rehabilitation robot. These offerings garnered significant interest at the event.

news.headline: EcoFlow launches Ambassador Program on Dec 6, inviting global users to promote sustainable living.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, EcoFlow, a prominent manufacturer of eco-friendly portable energy products, announced the commencement of its inaugural EcoFlow Ambassador Program. This initiative seeks to recruit individuals worldwide to serve as "EcoFlow Ambassadors," granting them the opportunity to...

news.headline: BSV's "Voice of Africa" campaign raises awareness on HDFN. 1,00,000+ foetuses and newborns die due to lack of treatment for Rh disease globally.
news.summary: Approximately 50% of women worldwide receive treatment for the Rh disease, a condition that has been associated with over 100,000 fetal and newborn deaths globally. The Rh factor, also referred to as the Rhesus factor, is a red blood cell surface antigen. This information was reported from Nairobi, Kenya on December 11, 2024, but the source has not been specified.

news.headline: BioVaxys lowers price per unit in private placement offering, Dec 11, 2024. ($BIOV CSE: BIOV, FRA: 5LB)
news.summary: BioVaxys Technology Corp., based in Vancouver, BC, disclosed on December 11, 2024, that it has decreased the price per unit of its shares. The company's stock symbol on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE) is BIOV, and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange (FRA) is 5LB. The announcement specified that the price reduction applies to each unit of the company's shares.

news.headline: CJ 4DPLEX and EVT to open three new 4DX theaters in Australia by Christmas 2024, expanding presence significantly.
news.summary: Two new cinemas are scheduled to open in Castle Hill and Innaloo, Australia, just in time for Christmas in 2024. CJ 4DPLEX, a top producer of premium film formats and cinema technologies, is partnering with EVT, the owners of Event Cinemas, the largest movie exhibitor in Australia for this project. This collaboration highlights the increasing focus on delivering high-quality cinema experiences. The openings mark significant milestones in the entertainment industry.

news.headline: BHP and Rio face allegations of permitting sexual harassment at mine sites.
Data indicates Ethereum has under 10% likelihood of hitting $5,000 by year-end, per Derive. Traders remain optimistic.
news.summary: According to Derive's analysis, the probability of Ether reaching a value of $5,000 by the conclusion of the year appears to be slim. However, traders are displaying heightened optimism, with a notable increase in ETF inflows.

news.headline: Judge denies The Onion's bid to buy Infowars; families of Sandy Hook victims and anti-gun violence nonprofit back the move.
news.summary: The offer by The Onion to purchase the conspiracy platform received backing from the families of individuals affected by the Sandy Hook tragedy and a non-profit organization dedicated to combatting gun violence.

news.headline: North Korea criticizes Yoon as a 'dictatorship' for the first time amid crisis. #NorthKorea #Yoon #dictatorship
UAE seals deal to enhance trade with countries like Russia; pact aims to increase exports by 2025.
South Korea's crypto reforms face uncertainty after martial law halts progress.
news.summary: South Korea's efforts to update its crypto sector are currently on hold, raising concerns about the country's path towards modernization.

news.headline: China sees decrease in corn imports, impacting consumer confidence.
Goldman Sachs CEO considers Bitcoin, Ethereum trading if regulations permit. Limited by regulations. Can't own cryptocurrency.
news.summary: The CEO of Goldman Sachs Group Inc. mentioned the company's interest in potentially becoming a spot market maker for top cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and Ethereum. During the Reuters NEXT event, David Solomon explained that regulatory limitations currently restrict the firm's involvement in spot trading for these digital assets. Solomon highlighted the need for more regulatory clarity in this regard, as Goldman Sachs, as a regulated banking institution, is currently not permitted to hold cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin as a principal. This move could open doors for the investment banking giant to delve deeper into the rapidly expanding cryptocurrency market, providing opportunities for growth and diversification of their portfolio.

news.headline: Chinese markets show caution as hopes decrease for a significant policy meeting with low attendance of investors.
Macy's expected to report loss of 1 cent per share on revenue of $4.72 billion; stock price at $16.71 in after-hours trading.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stock futures are showing a slight increase, and investors are likely to focus on specific stocks, including Macy’s, Inc. (NYSE:M). Wall Street anticipates Macy’s will report a quarterly loss of 1 cent per share with revenue reaching $4.72 billion before the opening bell. During after-hours trading, Macy’s shares experienced a 0.1% decline, reaching $16.71. In contrast, Stitch Fix, Inc. (NASDAQ:SFIX) exceeded expectations with its first-quarter earnings and sales figures released on Tuesday. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dow falls for 4th session, Alphabet surges on quantum chip news. Fear & Greed Index remains neutral. Dow Jones records losses. Oracle earnings disappoint. Alphabet shares up by 5.6% after quantum computing chip announcement. US labor productivity increases by 2.2%.
news.summary: The market sentiment, as per the CNN Money Fear and Greed index, saw a slight drop and remained in the neutral zone. On Tuesday, the U.S. stocks closed lower, marking the Dow Jones index's fourth consecutive session of losses. Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) reported disappointing earnings and sales for the second quarter. In contrast, Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) shares surged by 5.6% after the announcement of Google's quantum computing chip. Additionally, U.S. nonfarm business sector labor productivity showed a 2.2% increase. For further details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Smilegate's 'CROSSFIRE' animation released on Prime Video, featuring 15 episodes including 'Good Conflict'.
news.summary: The latest episode of CROSSFIREE titled "Good Conflict" is now available for streaming on Prime Video. This episode is part of a series of 15 episodes, making it the only Korean intellectual property featured. Smilegate, the company behind the global No.1 FPS game CROSSFIRE, made the announcement on December 10th from Seoul, South Korea. This news marks a significant milestone for the series, with viewers now able to enjoy the latest installment of the popular show.

news.headline: Boardwalk Pipelines approves Gulf South Pipeline's 1.16 Bcf/d Kosciusko Junction pipeline project.
news.summary: In Houston on December 11, 2024, the Board of Directors of Boardwalk Pipelines, LP announced their approval of Gulf South Pipeline Company, LLC's Kosciusko Junction pipeline project, also known as the Kosci Junction Project. This final investment decision will support a capacity of 1.16 billion cubic feet per day for the pipeline.

news.headline: Feintool and SITEC get major China order for hydrogen bipolar plates, production begins 2025 for leading fuel cell maker.
news.summary: Feintool, in collaboration with technology partner SITEC, recently secured a significant long-term contract in China for hydrogen mobility. The contract involves the production of ready-to-install metallic bipolar plates for a prominent Chinese fuel cell manufacturer. High-volume production is anticipated to commence by 2025.

news.headline: TECNO partners with Univ. of Leeds & Dar Al-Hekma Univ. to improve skin tone representation in Saudi Arabia. Commitment to inclusivity and innovation.
news.summary: TECNO is enhancing its Universal Tone technology to accurately portray the wide range of skin tones in Saudi Arabia, demonstrating its supremacy in mobile imaging and dedication to inclusivity and advancement. The development took place in RIYADH, Saudi Arabia, on Dec 11, 2024. This innovative technology initiative by TECNO showcases its commitment to catering to the diverse population, marking a significant step forward in mobile imaging technology.

news.headline: Infowars sale to The Onion blocked by judge after bid backed by families of Sandy Hook victims and gun safety group.
news.summary: The bid from The Onion received backing from the families affected by the tragic Sandy Hook shooting, as well as support from Everytown for Gun Safety, a non-profit organization dedicated to preventing gun violence.

news.headline: Judge rejects Infowars sale to The Onion, backed by Sandy Hook families and Everytown for Gun Safety, a gun violence prevention nonprofit.
news.summary: Everytown for Gun Safety and families of Sandy Hook shooting victims threw their support behind The Onion's bid.

news.headline: Houthi attacks disrupt shipping industry as Israel-Hamas conflict continues, leading to higher freight rates via southern Africa route.
news.summary: In the past, the transportation route around the southern tip of Africa saw minimal usage. However, there has been a significant shift, with an increasing number of freighters being compelled to navigate this route. This change has led to a surge in freight rates as demand for passage along this path has escalated.

news.headline: Britain's declining oil output jeopardizes jobs and skills as gov't plans to transition to clean energy, but alternatives are nascent.
news.summary: The government aims to swiftly transition from oil and natural gas to clean energy sources. However, offshore wind and other renewable alternatives are currently in their initial phases of development.

news.headline: Keep an eye on 50 companies in 2025. #business #predictions
EU urged to leverage single-market strengths amidst challenges. Economic integration key for growth. #EU #SingleMarket #Economy
Danger of climate inaction: 5-25% of corporate profits at risk by 2050, global GDP 22% lower by 2100. Carbon pricing vital.
news.summary: Climate change poses significant physical risks that could potentially impact 5% to 25% of corporate profits by the year 2050. Without immediate action, global GDP may decrease by up to 22% by 2100 compared to if effective climate measures are implemented. In a scenario where climate action is accelerated, the implementation of carbon pricing alone has the potential to result in...

news.headline: Surgo Health unveils Youth Mental Health Tracker with data on youth mental health and LGBTQ+ challenges.
news.summary: Surgo Health's Youth Mental Health Tracker, supported by funding from Pivotal and SHOWTIME/MTV Entertainment Studios, has unveiled fresh insights into the intricacies of youth mental health. The data highlights the influence of parents on seeking care and sheds light on the distinct challenges faced by LGBTQ+ youth. The findings from this report underscore the importance of tailored policies and interventions to address the mental well-being of young individuals.

news.headline: Research finds market gaps in women-focused products & services, with $32 trillion impact. Global survey of 15,000 women in 12 countries reveals dissatisfaction.
news.summary: A recent international survey conducted across 12 countries with nearly 15,000 respondents has revealed substantial discontent among women with the consumer goods, financial services, and healthcare options accessible to them. The results of the survey, released in Boston on December 11, 2024, indicate that women, who oversee approximately $32 trillion worldwide, are dissatisfied with the products and services available to them in these sectors.

news.headline: Quantum Computing, Inc. to raise $50 million through common stock offerings. Quantum optics company QCi announces investor agreements.
news.summary: Today, in Hoboken, New Jersey, Quantum Computing Inc. (QCi), a leading photonics and quantum optics technology firm, disclosed that it has signed securities purchase agreements with institutional investors. The company, trading as QUBT on Nasdaq, shared this news on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: VersiFi receives In-Principle Approval from FSRA in ADGM for digital assets DMA and OTC trading, launching from Abu Dhabi.
news.summary: VersiFi has revealed plans to introduce comprehensive digital asset trading solutions from its new headquarters in Abu Dhabi. The firm, specializing in digital asset trading and lending, disclosed that it has obtained In-Principle Approval (IPA) from the Financial Services Regulatory. This development was announced on December 11, 2024, in Abu Dhabi, UAE.

news.summary: The families impacted by the Sandy Hook shooting and the nonprofit organization Everytown for Gun Safety, which is dedicated to preventing gun violence, backed The Onion's proposal.

news.summary: Everytown for Gun Safety, a nonprofit dedicated to reducing gun violence, along with families of the victims from the Sandy Hook shooting, backed The Onion's proposal.

news.headline: China leads with 61% share of global EV traction inverter market in 3Q24, Europe aims to rebound.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, China held a significant 61% share of the global electric vehicle (EV) traction inverter market, leading the industry. This dominance was attributed to China's effective localization strategy and robust domestic demand for EVs.

news.headline: Japanese union leader urges government to speed up wage efforts.
